when.test: searchStatus != null and searchStatus == true and search != null and search.trim() != ''

choose.when: AND DATEDIFF(DAY, A.최근상담일, GETDATE()) >= 21 AND A.최근상담일 <> ''
AND DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), A.구직만료일) <= 15 AND A.구직만료일 <> ''
AND DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), A.기간만료일) <= 15 AND A.기간만료일 <> '' AND A.최근상담일 <> ''

mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
A.참여유형
A.참여자
A.최근상담일
A.진행단계
A.초기상담일
A.간접고용서비스
A.수당지급일
A.구직만료일
A.기간만료일
B.이름
A.마감
DATEDIFF(DAY, A.최근상담일, GETDATE())
A.IAP3개월일자
A.IAP3개월일자
A.구직번호
ASC
DESC
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(A.구직번호) totalCount FROM J_참여자관리 A JOIN J_참여자관리_로그인정보 B ON A.전담자_계정 = B.아이디 WHERE
SELECT COUNT(구직번호) AS participantCount From J_참여자관리_자격증 WHERE 구직번호=#{participantJobNo}
SELECT COUNT(구직번호) AS participantCount From J_참여자관리_직업훈련 WHERE 구직번호=#{participantJobNo}
SELECT COUNT(구직번호) AS participantCount From J_참여자관리 WHERE 구직번호=#{participantJobNo}

SELECT 구직번호 AS participantJobNo, 참여자 AS participantPartic, 성별 AS participantGender, 주소 AS participantAddress, 학교명 AS participantSchool, 전공 AS participantSpecialty, 희망직무 AS participantJobWant, 자격증 AS certificationName, 희망연봉 AS participantSalWant, 상담사 AS participantUserName, 이메일 AS participantEmail, 전화번호 AS participantPhoneNumber, 고유번호 AS participantCode FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY 구직번호 DESC) AS RowNum, 구직번호, 참여자, 성별, 주소, 학교명, 전공, 희망직무, 자격증, 희망연봉, 상담사, 이메일, 전화번호, 고유번호 FROM EXTERNALPARTICIPANT ) AS SUB_QUERY WHERE SUB_QUERY.RowNum>#{startPage} AND #{endPage} >= SUB_QUERY.RowNum;
SELECT COUNT(구직번호) AS totalCount FROM EXTERNALPARTICIPANT;
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM J_참여자관리 WHERE 구직번호 = #{participantJobNo} AND 전담자_계정 = #{participantUserid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO J_참여자관리_취소자백업 ( 구직번호, 참여자, 생년월일, 모집경로, 참여유형, 진행단계, 지점, 전담자_계정, 전담자, 참여자_등록일, 취소자백업_등록일 ) SELECT A.구직번호, A.참여자, A.생년월일, A.모집경로, A.참여유형, A.진행단계, A.지점, A.전담자_계정, B.이름, A.등록일, GETDATE() FROM J_참여자관리 A JOIN J_참여자관리_로그인정보 B ON A.전담자_계정 = B.아이디 WHERE A.진행단계 = '취소' AND (A.참여자_수정일 <= DATEADD(day, -7, GETDATE()) OR A.참여자_수정일 IS NULL)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM J_참여자관리 WHERE 진행단계 = '취소' AND (참여자_수정일 <= DATEADD(day, -7, GETDATE()) OR 참여자_수정일 IS NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(A.구직번호, '') AS participantJobNo, ISNULL(A.등록일, '') AS participantRegDate, ISNULL(B.이름, '') AS participantUserName, ISNULL(A.전담자_계정, '') AS participantUserid, ISNULL(A.참여자, '') AS participantPartic, ISNULL(A.생년월일, '') AS participantDob, ISNULL(A.성별, '') AS participantGender, ISNULL(A.모집경로, '') AS participantRecruit, ISNULL(A.참여유형, '') AS participantPartType, ISNULL(A.학교명, '') AS participantSchool, ISNULL(A.전공, '') AS participantSpecialty, ISNULL(A.주소, '') AS participantAddress, ISNULL(A.경력, '') AS participantAntecedents, ISNULL(A.특정계층, '') AS participantSpecific, ISNULL(A.알선요청, '') AS participantPlacement, ISNULL(A.취업역량, '') AS participantJobSkill, ISNULL(A.최근상담일, '') AS participantLastCons, ISNULL(A.진행단계, '') AS participantProgress, ISNULL(A.초기상담일, '') AS participantInItCons, ISNULL(A.구직만료일, '') AS participantJobEX, ISNULL(A.기간만료일, '') AS participantEXPDate, ISNULL(A.IAP수료일, '') AS participantIAPDate, ISNULL(A.IAP3개월여부, '') AS participantISIAP3Month, ISNULL(A.IAP3개월일자, '') AS participantIAP3Month, ISNULL(A.IAP5개월여부, '') AS participantISIAP5Month, ISNULL(A.IAP5개월일자, '') AS participantIAP5Month, ISNULL(A.수당지급일, '') AS participantAllowanceDate, ISNULL(WISH1.희망직무, '') AS participantJobWant, ISNULL( IIF(ISNUMERIC(A.희망급여) = 1, ROUND(CONVERT(DECIMAL(10,2), A.희망급여), 0), '0'), '0' ) AS participantSalWant, ISNULL(A.취창업일, '') AS participantStartDate, ISNULL(A.취창업처리일, '') AS participantProcDate, ISNULL(A.취업유형, '') AS participantEmpType, ISNULL(A.취업처, '') AS participantLoyer, ISNULL( IIF(ISNUMERIC(A.임금) = 1, ROUND(CONVERT(DECIMAL(10,2), A.임금), 0), '0'), '0' ) AS participantSalary, ISNULL(A.직무, '') AS participantJobRole, ISNULL(A.취업인센티브_구분, '') AS participantIncentive, ISNULL(A.일경험분류, '') AS participantJobcat, ISNULL(A.메모, '') AS participantMemo, ISNULL(A.기타, '') AS participantOthers, ISNULL(A.마감, '') AS participantClose, ISNULL(A.퇴사일, '') AS participantQuit, ISNULL(A.지점, '') AS participantBranch, ISNULL(A.간접고용서비스, '') AS participantEmploymentService, ISNULL(A.전담자_변경일, '') AS participantManagerChangeDate, ISNULL(A.초기전담자_계정, '') AS participantInitialManagerAccount, ISNULL(A.참여자_수정일, '') AS participantModifyDate, ISNULL(A.집중알선여부, '') AS participantISIntensiveMediation FROM J_참여자관리 A LEFT JOIN J_참여자관리_로그인정보 B ON A.전담자_계정 = B.아이디 OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 W.희망직무 FROM J_참여자관리_희망직무 W WHERE W.구직번호 = A.구직번호 ORDER BY W.희망순위 ASC, W.PK ASC ) WISH1 WHERE

SELECT A.구직번호 AS participantJobNo, ISNULL(B.이름, '') AS participantUserName, ISNULL(A.참여자, '') AS participantPartic, ISNULL(C.직무_카테고리_대, '') AS excelCategoryLarge, ISNULL(C.직무_카테고리_중, '') AS excelCategoryMid, ISNULL(C.희망직무, '') AS excelWishJob FROM J_참여자관리 A LEFT JOIN J_참여자관리_로그인정보 B ON A.전담자_계정 = B.아이디 INNER JOIN J_참여자관리_희망직무 C ON A.구직번호 = C.구직번호 WHERE
ORDER BY A.구직번호 DESC, C.희망순위 ASC, C.PK ASC

SELECT A.구직번호 AS participantJobNo, ISNULL(B.이름, '') AS participantUserName, ISNULL(A.참여자, '') AS participantPartic, ISNULL(C.자격증, '') AS excelCertificateName FROM J_참여자관리 A LEFT JOIN J_참여자관리_로그인정보 B ON A.전담자_계정 = B.아이디 INNER JOIN J_참여자관리_자격증 C ON A.구직번호 = C.구직번호 WHERE
ORDER BY A.구직번호 DESC, C.자격증번호 ASC

SELECT A.구직번호 AS participantJobNo, ISNULL(B.이름, '') AS participantUserName, ISNULL(A.참여자, '') AS participantPartic, ISNULL(C.직업훈련, '') AS excelTrainingName FROM J_참여자관리 A LEFT JOIN J_참여자관리_로그인정보 B ON A.전담자_계정 = B.아이디 INNER JOIN J_참여자관리_직업훈련 C ON A.구직번호 = C.구직번호 WHERE
ORDER BY A.구직번호 DESC, C.직업훈련번호 ASC

SELECT A.구직번호 AS participantJobNo, B.이름 AS participantUserName, A.참여자 AS participantPartic, A.취업인센티브_구분 AS participantIncentive, CASE WHEN A.등록일 > '1900-01-01' THEN A.등록일 END AS participantRegDate, CASE WHEN A.취창업일 > '1900-01-01' THEN A.취창업일 END AS participantStartDate, CASE WHEN A.초기상담일 > '1900-01-01' THEN A.초기상담일 END AS participantInItCons FROM SUCCESSMONEY A RIGHT JOIN J_참여자관리_로그인정보 B ON A.전담자_계정 = B.아이디 WHERE A.지점 <> '테스트' AND A.지점 = #{participantBranch} AND A.취창업일 >= #{searchStartDate} AND A.취창업일 <= #{searchEndDate} AND A.취업인센티브_구분 LIKE '%서비스 미제공%' ORDER BY A.지점 DESC
